basic_details.organization_name: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
basic_details.short_information: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) Consultant (Civil/ Electrical Engineer) Notification 2026 has been released on 01-06-2026 on the official website of ICSI. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICSI Consultant (Civil/ Electrical Engineer) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.tech (Civil Engineering) or equivalent from Government recognized Universities / Institutes.
qualification.details: BE/B.tech (Civil Engineering) or equivalent from Government recognized Universities / Institutes.

salary_details.details: Consolidated payout will be in the range of Rs.40,000/- to Rs.50,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICSI Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the ICSI Consultant (Civil/ Electrical Engineer) posts is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.tech degree in Civil Engineering or an equivalent qualification from a government-recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant (Civil/ Electrical Engineer) post is 40 years as of the cut-off date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated payout in the range of Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant (Civil/ Electrical Engineer) position announced by ICSI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the ICSI Consultant Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. No other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the notification, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection methods for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant (Civil/ Electrical Engineer) post will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. When does the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the ICSI Consultant Recruitment 2026 begins on 1st June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link is provided.
